passives.name: Upgrade
passives.effects: You have completed the support quest and can now upgrade this item, '''Bounty of Worlds''', for free into ''{{ii|Bloodsong}}'', ''{{ii|Celestial Opposition}}'', ''{{ii|Dream Maker}}'', ''{{ii|Solstice Sleigh}}'', or ''{{ii|Zaz'Zak's Realmspike}}'' by selecting one of them from a custom menu in the HUD or the shop. ''The upgrade can be done outside the shop using the menu.''
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

active.name: Ward
active.effects: Consumes a charge to place a {{tip|Stealth Ward}} at the target location, which grants {{tip|sight}} of the surrounding area. Charges refill upon visiting the shop.

effects_structured.raw: Support quest completed; can upgrade into a support item via menu.
Diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

modifiers.post_5_minutes_gold_reduction_formula_no: 50% + 1% per minion kill starting from 20 kills, capped at 50 kills

effects_structured.raw: Place a Stealth Ward; charges refill at shop.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Bounty of Worlds is modeled as the support-quest completion hub that upgrades into one of the final support-item branches while retaining ward utility.

Support-income diminishing minion-gold behavior encodes page-verified pre/post-5-minute threshold formulas and reduction ranges, while exact per-minute windowing and team support-item dynamics remain shared-rule dependencies.
Sell-state policy resolved for support-quest staging: represent page-verified No Sell behavior with shop.prices.sell = 0 for quest-stage items.
Tier-1 dataset discrepancy is intentionally tracked: Data Dragon and CommunityDragon still list sell=160 for this item while page-level gameplay behavior shows No Sell.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Bounty of Worlds
sources.used_for: page-level verification of support-item branch upgrade semantics, support-income diminishing-gold pre/post-5-minute rule formulas, and No Sell behavior
